positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical arrangement of celestial botanicals and mythical flora. Central motif features glowing crescent moons intertwined with stylized, deep indigo foliage and luminescent geometric vines. The overall composition should have a strong, clean silhouette suitable for apparel printing. Use a vibrant yet muted color palette of cosmic teal, deep sapphire blue, metallic gold, and forest emerald green. Style should be a blend of Alphonse Mucha poster art and modern graphic linocut, achieving high contrast and intricate linework. Ensure the artwork is contained within a perfect central oval frame, isolated against a solid, complementary background.
negative: blurry, messy, grainy, artifact, poor composition, text, signature, watermark, lowres, extra limbs, malformed hands, bad anatomy, human figures, realism, logo, trademark
